description: Example showing RAML 1.0 traits for reusable method behaviors
note: Traits allow defining cross-cutting concerns like pagination and error responses once and applying them to multiple methods
example_yaml:
#%RAML 1.0
title: Traits Example API
version: v1

traits:
  pageable:
    queryParameters:
      limit:
        type: integer
        default: 25
        minimum: 1
        maximum: 100
      offset:
        type: integer
        default: 0
    responses:
      400:
        description: Bad pagination parameters

  secured:
    headers:
      Authorization:
        type: string
        description: Bearer token
        pattern: "Bearer .+"
    responses:
      401:
        description: Unauthorized
      403:
        description: Forbidden

/items:
  get:
    is: [pageable, secured]
    description: Get items with pagination and authentication
    responses:
      200:
        description: Paginated item list

key_concepts.trait_application: Applied to methods using the 'is' keyword as a list
key_concepts.parameterization: Traits can accept parameters using <<paramName>> syntax
key_concepts.multiple_traits: A method can apply multiple traits in sequence
